prompt: Create a highly detailed cozy miniature diorama room in a soft pastel, hand-drawn storybook-anime style, shown in a three-quarter isometric view as a tiny open box with stitched beige fabric walls and floor edges. The scene centers on a young woman seated at a wooden writing desk, wearing a pink pastel plaid dress with ruffled off-shoulder sleeves, lace trim, a bow at the chest, and a delicate necklace; her long wavy light brown hair falls over her shoulders, and her face is covered by a flat plain tan square censor patch. She is writing with a pen in an open notebook on the desk. The desk contains exactly 10 visible tabletop items: one open notebook, one pen in her hand, one teacup on a saucer filled with tea, one pink closed notebook, two round buttons, one blue wrapped candy, one pink striped candy, one tiny yellow candy, and one small flower. Add a warm wooden window on the left with lace curtains and garden light shining through; outside the window are pink roses and greenery. Include exactly three fluffy white clouds floating near the window, plus small star and flower doodles around the room. On the right wall place a pink stitched name plaque reading luffynodoo with tiny heart doodles around it, plus two blue cloud doodles and two yellow star doodles. Furnish the right side with a small wooden shelf and cabinet containing exactly four upright books, one potted succulent, one lampshade, and one jar labeled CANDY. Add a woven basket plant on the floor, a wooden chair, a small red rug, scattered embroidery-like flowers, a looping yellow thread, and delicate candy, flower, star, and cloud motifs throughout. Use warm sunlight, soft shadows, realistic miniature textures, embroidered fabric seams, intricate lace, wood grain, pastel pink and beige tones, cute whimsical atmosphere, high detail, square composition, no extra text except the wall sign and candy jar label.
